# Scott Cullum

> Scott Cullum is a creative technologist who helps teams cut through ambiguity and move the work forward. His work sits across design, engineering, and product, bridging conversations that often slow progress.

Scott works in an AI-native way — faster exploration, fewer wasted cycles. Most clients bring him in part-time for senior direction and hands-on support; when a project needs more depth, he works with a small network of trusted collaborators.

## How he helps

- Advisory support for product and technology leaders
- AI-native prototyping and technical exploration
- Capability building for teams adopting modern workflows

## Pages

- [About](https://scullum.com/about): background and approach
- [Services](https://scullum.com/services): engagement models and offerings
- [Work](https://scullum.com/work): selected projects and case studies

## Contact

- Email: scott@cullum.co
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/scullum/)
